FROM orders

Which department has the most employees?.question: Which department has the most employees?
Which department has the most employees?.final_sql:
SELECT
  T1.name
FROM departments AS T1
INNER JOIN employees AS T2
  ON T2.department_id = T1.id
GROUP BY
  T1.name
ORDER BY
  COUNT(T2.id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

Which department has the most employees?.question: Which department has the most employees?
Which department has the most employees?.final_sql:
SELECT
  T1.name
FROM departments AS T1
INNER JOIN employees AS T2
  ON T2.department_id = T1.id
GROUP BY
  T1.name
ORDER BY
  COUNT(T2.id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

Which department has the most employees?.question: Which department has the most employees?
Which department has the most employees?.final_sql:
SELECT
  d.name
FROM employees AS e
INNER JOIN departments AS d
  ON e.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY
  d.name
ORDER BY
  COUNT(e.id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

Show me total revenue by product categor.question: Show me total revenue by product category
Show me total revenue by product categor.final_sql:
SELECT
  c.name,
  SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue
FROM order_items AS oi
INNER JOIN products AS p
  ON oi.product_id = p.id
INNER JOIN categories AS c
  ON p.category_id = c.id
GROUP BY
  c.name;

Show me total revenue by product categor.question: Show me total revenue by product category
Show me total revenue by product categor.final_sql:
SELECT
  c.name,
  SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue
FROM order_items AS oi
INNER JOIN products AS p
  ON oi.product_id = p.id
INNER JOIN categories AS c
  ON p.category_id = c.id
INNER JOIN orders AS o
  ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE
  o.status != 'cancelled'
GROUP BY
  c.name;

Show me total revenue by product categor.question: Show me total revenue by product category
Show me total revenue by product categor.final_sql: SELECT T2.name, SUM(T1.quantity * T1.unit_price) AS total_revenue FROM order_items AS T1 INNER JOIN products AS T3 ON T1.product_id = T3.id INNER JOIN categories AS T2 ON T3.category_id = T2.id GROUP BY T2.name

Which products have the highest profit m.question: Which products have the highest profit margin?
Which products have the highest profit m.final_sql:
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  (price - cost) * 1.0 / price AS profit_margin
FROM products
ORDER BY
  profit_margin DESC;

How many orders were placed each month i.question: How many orders were placed each month in 2024?
How many orders were placed each month i.final_sql: SELECT strftime('%m', order_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE strftime('%Y', order_date) = '2024' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

Show me total revenue by product categor.question: Show me total revenue by product category
Show me total revenue by product categor.final_sql:
SELECT
  c.name,
  SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue
FROM categories AS c
INNER JOIN products AS p
  ON c.id = p.category_id
INNER JOIN order_items AS oi
  ON p.id = oi.product_id
INNER JOIN orders AS o
  ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE
  o.status != 'cancelled'
GROUP BY
  c.name;

Show me total revenue by product categor.question: Show me total revenue by product category
Show me total revenue by product categor.final_sql:
SELECT
  c.name,
  SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue
FROM categories AS c
INNER JOIN products AS p
  ON c.id = p.category_id
INNER JOIN order_items AS oi
  ON p.id = oi.product_id
INNER JOIN orders AS o
  ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE
  o.status != 'cancelled'
GROUP BY
  c.name
ORDER BY
  total_revenue DESC;

Which products have the highest profit m.question: Which products have the highest profit margin?

Which products have the highest profit m.question: Which products have the highest profit margin?
Which products have the highest profit m.final_sql:
SELECT
  name,
  CAST(price - cost AS REAL) / price AS profit_margin
FROM products
WHERE
  price > 0
ORDER BY
  profit_margin DESC;

How many orders were placed each month i.question: How many orders were placed each month in 2024?
How many orders were placed each month i.final_sql:
SELECT
  strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) AS order_month,
  COUNT(*) AS total_orders
FROM orders
WHERE
  strftime('%Y', order_date) = '2024' AND status != 'cancelled'
GROUP BY
  order_month
ORDER BY
  order_month;
